form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when a 8 length eighth (19.91) at Healesville. Previous form sound including a win three back at Sale. Capable and may well bounce back this time.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Colliding and fell in catching pen.

form.formComment: Last start finished 7th over 425m at this track beaten 11 lengths (24.36) behind Dapper Chap in a Grade 5 on March 27. Recorded two placings in a row prior to the latest effort. Worth another chance.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Had been in consistent form with four minors on end before missing the frame last start when fifth (28.23) at this track. Has a low draw but looks safely held.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Had been in consistent form with four minors on end before missing the frame last start when fifth (28.23) at this track. Has a low draw but looks safely held.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 3 lengths over 390m at Shepparton in a handy (22.10), beating Twilight Sleuth. Sure to be about the mark.

form.formComment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 3 length second at this track but did record a hot 23.86 for the 425m trip. Place prospects appear best again.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (24.40) in a Restricted WIN H, finishing a 9 length sixth. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and three minors. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by a neck at this track over 425m (24.01) beating Sonia's Beauty in Grade 5 on March 27. The testing material.
